title: Default PvP
description: A clean, default style pack optimized for PvP.
body:
Enhance your PvP skills with the **Default PvP** texture pack! This pack keeps the default Minecraft feel while adding crucial competitive advantages.

**Changes Include:**
- **Shorter Swords**: For a less obstructed view during combat.
- **Outlined Ores**: Makes spotting valuable resources quick and easy.
- **Low Fire**: Keeps your vision clear even when you're on fire.
- **Transparent Water**: For better visibility of enemies and terrain underwater.
- **Bow Charge Indicator**: A visual cue lets you know when your bow is fully drawn for maximum damage.
- **Transparent GUI**: See the world around you even when managing your inventory.
